nasb.text: who by faith conquered kingdoms, performed acts of righteousness, obtained promises, shut the mouths of lions,

esv.text: who through faith conquered kingdoms, enforced justice, obtained promises, stopped the mouths of lions,

cnv.text: 他們藉著信，就戰勝了敵國，伸張了正義，得到了應許，堵住了獅子的口，

ccb.text: 他们凭信心战胜了敌国，行了公义，得到了应许，堵住了狮子的口，

csbs.text: 他们藉着信，征服了列国，行了公义，获得了那些应许；他们堵住了狮子的口，
